MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Steven Mains, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. a national banking assoc.
Plaintiff's witness: Dennis Shirron, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Trans Pacific Gateway, Inc., a corporation dba Frank Howard Allen; and Peter Louie as follows:
Damages $63,326.65
Prejudgment Interest $11,379.79
Attorney's Fees $7,325.00
Costs $897.50 for a total of $82,928.94
Judgment signed in open court.
